title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: DeepSeek V4 is a large language model featuring a 1M context window and hybrid attention mechanisms including CSA, sparse selection, HCA, and sliding window attention. The model incorporates architectural innovations like mHC, Muon, and anticipatory routing to achieve efficiency gains and state-of-the-art results.
